title: Mythic Apples
description: Adds a wide variety of new apples to Minecraft, each crafted from different materials and granting unique effects. From simple early-game upgrades to powerful endgame items, this mod expands apples into a full progression system with both helpful and risky
body:
![MYTHIC APPLES](https://i.imgur.com/Rnb6q41.png)

---

# ![enderdragonapple](https://i.imgur.com/JndwKqc.png) Mythic Apples




---

## ✨ Overview

**Mythic Apples** adds a huge variety of new apples to Minecraft, each crafted from different materials and granting unique effects.

From weak and cursed apples… to completely overpowered endgame items, this mod transforms apples into a full progression system.

---

## 🍎 Apples & Effects 
---
### ![iron](https://i.imgur.com/KIl8KXg.png) Iron Apple

* Absorption I
* Regeneration II
* 📍 Has a chance to appear in **Farmer Villager (Journeyman)** trades

---

### ![diamond](https://i.imgur.com/TmOk55o.png) Diamond Apple

* Absorption V
* Fire Resistance II
* Resistance II
* Regeneration V

---

### ![netherite](https://i.imgur.com/Pv7MOyP.png) Netherite Apple

* Instant Health II
* Speed II
* Fire Resistance II
* Absorption VII
* 📍 You must need an item called **Apple Upgrade Template.**

---

### ![emerald](https://i.imgur.com/IW7AcGe.png) Emerald Apple

* Absorption V
* Speed II
* Haste III
* Regeneration II
* Resistance V
* Hero of the Village

---

### ![lapislazuli](https://i.imgur.com/CfcKEOb.png) Lapis Apple

* Absorption III
* Strength III
* Instant Health IV
* Jump Boost II

---

### ![redstone](https://i.imgur.com/D6uQ9Am.png) Redstone Apple

* Absorption X
* Regeneration III
* Fire Resistance II

---

### ![coal](https://i.imgur.com/dZLFYnY.png) Coal Apple

* Nausea I
* Instant Health II

---

### ![copper](https://i.imgur.com/DNsvLDP.png) Copper Apple

* Haste II
* Speed III
* Slow Falling III

---

### ![heartofthesea](https://i.imgur.com/VxvoVdS.png) Heart of the Sea Apple

* Water Breathing II
* Dolphin’s Grace II
* Luck II
* Conduit Power II
* 📍 Crafting recipe is a bit expensive...

---

### ![soulsand](https://i.imgur.com/m9UI8Mq.png) Soul Sand Apple (Cursed)

* Weakness II
* Poison II
* Slowness II
* Hunger I

---

### ![soulsand](https://i.imgur.com/m9UI8Mq.png) + ![soulsand](https://i.imgur.com/9dhD0hn.png) Soul Sand Golden Apple

* Speed V

---

### ![soulsand](https://i.imgur.com/sa0a22D.png) Ender Dragon Apple (ENDGAME)

* Absorption L
* Strength L
* Regeneration X
* Fire Resistance II

---

### ![bluedye](https://i.imgur.com/AwLulxG.png) Blue Dye Apple

* Nausea I

---

## ⚖️ Balance

This mod includes a mix of:

* ✅ Balanced progression apples
* ⚠️ Risky / cursed apples
* 💀 Extremely overpowered endgame apples

Perfect for players who want both challenge and insane power.

---

## 🎮 Perfect For

* Survival & Hardcore worlds
* Late-game progression
* Modpacks that need stronger items
* Players who like OP gear 😈

---

## 🚀 Future Plans

* More apples
* New effects
* Even crazier endgame items 👀

---
## 🍎 Recipes

Use JEI or REI for recipes

---

## ❤️ Support

If you enjoy the mod, consider downloading and sharing it!

More updates coming soon 🔥
